mapper.select:
SELECT '' AS GRP_ID
, '' AS CD_VAL , '전체' AS CD_DSC
, '' AS CD_VAL , '선택' AS CD_DSC
, '' AS ETC1 , '' AS ETC2 , '' AS ETC3 , '' AS ETC4 , '' AS ETC5 , '' AS ETC6 , '1' AS SORT_NO FROM DUAL UNION ALL
SELECT B.GRP_ID , B.CD_VAL , B.CD_DSC , B.ETC1 , B.ETC2 , B.ETC3 , B.ETC4 , B.ETC5 , B.ETC6 , '2' AS SORT_NO FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.GRP_ID = #{grpId} ORDER BY SORT_NO ASC, CD_VAL ASC

SELECT '' AS GRP_ID
, '' AS CD_VAL , '전체' AS CD_DSC
, '' AS CD_VAL , '선택' AS CD_DSC
, '' AS ETC1 , '' AS ETC2 , '' AS ETC3 , '' AS ETC4 , '' AS ETC5 , '' AS ETC6 , '1' AS SORT_NO FROM DUAL UNION ALL
SELECT B.GRP_ID , B.CD_VAL , B.CD_DSC , B.ETC1 , B.ETC2 , B.ETC3 , B.ETC4 , B.ETC5 , B.ETC6 , '2' AS SORT_NO FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.GRP_ID = #{grpId} ORDER BY SORT_NO ASC, CD_VAL ASC

SELECT GRP_KOR_NM /* 0 : 그룹 한글명 */ ,GRP_ENG_NM /* 1 : 그룹 영어명 */ ,GRP_DSC /* 2 : 그룹 설명 */ ,USG_YN /* 3 : 사용여부 */ ,COL_KOR_NM /* 4 : 컬럼 한글명 */ ,COL_ENG_NM /* 5 : 컬럼 영어명 */ ,REMRK /* 6 : 비고 */ ,REGST_ID /* 7 : 등록자ID */ ,REG_DTTM /* 8 : 등록일시 */ ,RVISN_ID /* 9 : 수정자ID */ ,RVISN_DTTM /* 10 : 수정일시 */ ,DUTY_SCTN /* 11 : 업무 구분 */ FROM CMN_GRP_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{GRP_ID}
SELECT form_name, /* 폼명 */ table_name /* 테이블명 */ FROM TEMP_FORM_TABLE ORDER BY form_name, table_name
SELECT owner, table_name FROM all_tables WHERE owner = 'MSP_MNG'
SELECT table_name, column_name, comments FROM all_col_comments WHERE owner = 'MSP_MNG' ORDER BY table_name, column_name

SELECT TBL_A.table_name, /* 테이블명 */ TBL_A.column_id, /* 컬럼순번 */ TBL_A.column_name, /* 컬럼명 */ TBL_A.data_type, /* 컬럼유형 */ TBL_A.data_length, /* 컬럼길이 */ TBL_A.nullable, /* Nullable */ TBL_B.constraint_type /* 키 */ FROM all_tab_columns TBL_A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cols.table_name, cols.column_name, cols.position, cons.constraint_type, cons.status, cons.owner FROM all_constraints cons, all_cons_columns cols WHERE cons.constraint_type = 'P' AND cons.constraint_name = cols.constraint_name AND cons.owner = cols.owner AND cons.owner = 'MSP_MNG' ) TBL_B ON TBL_A.table_name = TBL_B.table_name AND TBL_A.column_name = TBL_B.column_name where TBL_A.owner = 'MSP_MNG' ORDER BY TBL_A.table_name, TBL_A.column_id

SELECT table_name, /* 테이블명 */ column_id, /* 컬럼순번 */ column_name, /* 컬럼명 */ data_type, /* 컬럼유형 */ data_length, /* 컬럼길이 */ nullable, /* Nullable */ constraint_type /* 키 */ FROM TEMP_TABLE_COLUMNS ORDER BY table_name, column_id
SELECT GRP_ID , CD_VAL , CD_DSC , USG_YN , ETC1 , ETC2 , ETC3 , ETC4 , ETC5 , ETC6 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{grpId} AND CD_VAL = #{cdVal}
SELECT CD_GROUP_ID , DTL_CD , DTL_CD_NM , DTL_CD_DESC , USE_YN , EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 , EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 , EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = #{grpId} AND DTL_CD = #{cdVal}
